header:
{
		"Accept-Language": "zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8,en-GB;q=0.7,en-US;q=0.6",
		"Accept": "*/*",
		"Connection": "keep-alive",
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 9; MIX 2S Build/PKQ1.180729.001; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/72.0.3626.121 Mobile Safari/537.36",
		"Referer": "https://m.lrts.me/",
		"X-Requested-With": "kaixin.diantai"
}

ruleBookInfo.author: {{$.author}} 演播：{{$.announcer}}
ruleBookInfo.name: $.name@put:{n: $.sections, entityType: $..entityType}

ruleSearch.author: {{$.author}}  演播：{{$.announcer}}
ruleSearch.bookList:
<js>
if(/getResourceList/.test(baseUrl)&&/pageNum=1/.test(baseUrl)){
  bookIds = JSON.parse(result).bookIds;
  source.put('bookIds', bookIds);
  //cache.putFile('bookIds', bookIds, 3.6E6);
  result = result;
}
else{result = result;}
</js>
$..list[*]||$.books[*]
ruleSearch.checkKeyWord: 御兽之王 | 24新晋白金作家轻泉流响 | 起点霸榜 | 快节奏爽文
ruleSearch.name: $.name

bookSourceComment: [read2xsgg] exploreUrl 为声明式迁移分类；分页由 read2xsgg.catalogPlan 描述，勿依赖源站专用适配器。

headers.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 9; MIX 2S Build/PKQ1.180729.001; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/72.0.3626.121 Mobile Safari/537.36

read2xsgg.notes: 原 exploreUrl 依赖 java.ajax/getCategory + bookIds 切片；已改为声明式 catalogPlan。分类表为迁移快照，新分类需更新本 fixture 或提供含 read2xsgg.catalogPlan 的源后重新转换。
